steps.title: Compare the cause claims
steps.content: Text 1's underlined claim says Deccan Traps volcanic activity was the true cause of the K-Pg event. Text 2 says those gases affected climate before the event, but the climate had returned to normal before the extinctions began and the extinctions align with the Chicxulub impact.

steps.title: Reject opposing responses
steps.content:
• Choice A says Ross's team would agree that Deccan Traps caused the event, which contradicts Text 2.
  • Choice C raises a Chicxulub-caused-eruption issue that neither text discusses.
  • Choice D says Deccan Traps had a more significant effect than claimed, but Text 2 downplays it as the main cause.
The remaining choice states that Deccan climate changes were not the main cause. The answer is B.
